title: Professor Beware
writer: Delmer Daves, Jack Cunningham, Clyde Bruckman
actors: Harold Lloyd, Phyllis Welch, William Frawley
plot: Egyptologist, Dean Lambert (Lloyd), accused of car-theft, skips bail and begins a cross-country trek to join a group in New York headed for Egypt. With the police close on his trail he gets in and out of scrapes along the way.
